C:\dev\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\cipher_client.dir/objects.a
C:\dev\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\cipher_client.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\cipher_client.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\dev\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\cipher_client.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o cipher_client.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcipher_client.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\cipher_client.dir\linkLibs.rsp
